contract.name: Make Immediate Match
contract.description: Swap adjacent candies to complete a match immediately, clearing pieces and scoring right away. Use it whenever a simple 3+ match is available, especially early in the board to keep moves efficient and

contract.name: Clear Immediate Match
contract.description: Swap two adjacent candies to complete an immediate 3-in-a-row and clear it. Use this whenever a direct match is available, especially early in the board, to score points and open space for new candies

contract.name: Make Immediate Match
contract.description: Swap two adjacent candies to complete a 3-in-a-row match immediately. Use it when an obvious match is available, especially early in the level, to score points, clear space, and set up cascades.

contract.name: Swap Row 3 Center
contract.description: Swap the two center candies in row 3 to create an immediate 3-match or trigger a nearby cascade. Use it in midgame when that row’s middle controls multiple possible matches or can activate special can
